_doc: Morphology graded-curriculum weights (Wave 1 W1a, H946). Follows the sandhi programme's MG ruling: weights are a visible, tunable config, NOT hard-coded in Python -- edit this file and re-run scripts/build_morphology_drills.py to re-tune the syllabus. Lessons group by declension/conjugation CLASS bucket (a-stems -> other-vowel-stems -> consonant-stems -> pronouns -> present-class-verbs -> other), per IMPLEMENTATION_KOSHA_PEDAGOGY_WAVE1.md SS3. The bucket-ASSIGNMENT rule itself (which Cologne model prefix is which class) is a linguistic fact, not a tunable number, and lives in build_morphology_curriculum.py's bucket_for_model(); this file holds only what MG can re-tune without touching code.
